info.name: SteelSense API Collection
info.description: Collection of endpoints to test raw IoT telemetry ingestion, live/historical dashboard statistics, and manual ML model simulation.

request.description: Ingests raw telemetry parameters from simulated IoT hardware into database, calculating time properties (NSM, day status, weekday name).
Retrieves the single latest record in the monitoring database (which could be raw or scheduler-aggregated AI predictions).

response.name: Latest Record Example (AI Processed)
response.body:
{
  "id": 2,
  "machine_id": "machine-01",
  "timestamp": "2026-06-25T17:43:20.000000",
  "usage_kwh": 45.2,
  "lagging_reactive": 12.5,
  "leading_reactive": 5.4,
  "lagging_pf": 0.88,
  "leading_pf": 0.92,
  "co2": 1.25,
  "nsm": 63800,
  "week_status": "Weekday",
  "day_of_week": "Thursday",
  "load_type": "Light_Load",
  "confidence": 0.90,
  "risk_level": "Low",
  "recommendation": "Idle or low-load status. Recommend shutting down non-essential systems and standby equipment to minimize baseline consumption.",
  "alert_status": "Normal",
  "created_at": "2026-06-25T17:43:20.123456"
}

query.description: Limits the number of returned records (1-200)

request.description: Retrieves historical database records sorted chronologically (ascending) for dashboard charts.

response.name: Historical Rows Example
response.body:

request.description: Submits electrical metrics manually to compute instant ML classification load types, risk levels, alert status, and recommendations without database persistence.

response.name: Medium Load Prediction Example
response.body:
{
  "load_type": "Medium_Load",
  "confidence": 0.85,
  "risk_level": "Medium",
  "recommendation": "Normal operational load but power factor is low. Check capacitor banks to avoid low power factor utility penalties.",
  "alert_status": "Warning"
}
